caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" visible, a black baseball cap, a gold chain, a gold bracelet, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a white wall with a repeated logo featuring the words "FORCE HUSTLE" and several black stars. Large, stylized text reading "BOSS TALK 101" appears behind him and as a graphic overlay in the lower corners of the screen, which also includes the words "PODCAST" and "TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly, shifting his facial expression and head position. He remains seated in the same position while talking into the microphone, with the camera angle staying constant as he interacts with someone off-screen.
